questions.question: The great prostitute is seated on what?
questions.feedback: The great prostitute sits on many waters, which represent peoples and nations.

questions.question: What name was written on the woman's forehead?
questions.feedback: On her forehead: Babylon the Great, the Mother of Prostitutes.

questions.question: The scarlet beast the woman sits on has seven heads and ten horns.
questions.feedback: The beast was scarlet and had seven heads and ten horns.

questions.question: The seven heads represent seven _____ on which the woman sits.
questions.feedback: The seven heads are seven hills on which the woman sits.

questions.question: The Lamb will triumph over the kings because he is Lord of lords and _____ of kings.
questions.feedback: The Lamb will triumph because he is Lord of lords and King of kings.
